'''vazhunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beachgoing|beachgoing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-zh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beachgoing|beachgoing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vazhunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væzhinith|væzhinith]] || [[word:væzhinij|væzhinij]] || [[word:væzhinish|væzhinish]] || [[word:væzhini|væzhini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vazhuzhunuth|vazhuzhunuth]] || [[word:vazhuzhunuj|vazhuzhunuj]] || [[word:vazhuzhunush|vazhuzhunush]] || [[word:vazhuzhunu|vazhuzhunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vazhunuth|vazhunuth]] || [[word:vazhunuj|vazhunuj]] || [[word:vazhunush|vazhunush]] || [[word:vazhunu|vazhunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vazhufnuth|vazhufnuth]] || [[word:vazhufnuj|vazhufnuj]] || [[word:vazhufnush|vazhufnush]] || [[word:vazhufnuf|vazhufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vazhunuthu|vazhunuthu]] || [[word:vazhunuju|vazhunuju]] || [[word:vazhunushu|vazhunushu]] || [[word:vazhunuku|vazhunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vazhunuth|vazhunuth]] || [[word:vazhunuj|vazhunuj]] || [[word:vazhunush|vazhunush]] || [[word:vazhunu|vazhunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vazhunuthul|vazhunuthul]] || [[word:vazhunujul|vazhunujul]] || [[word:vazhunushul|vazhunushul]] || [[word:vazhunukul|vazhunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vazhunuthuthu|vazhunuthuthu]] || [[word:vazhunujuju|vazhunujuju]] || [[word:vazhunushushu|vazhunushushu]] || [[word:vazhunuku|vazhunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vazhunuthun|vazhunuthun]] || [[word:vazhunujun|vazhunujun]] || [[word:vazhunushun|vazhunushun]] || [[word:vazhunukun|vazhunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vazhunuthuoro|vazhunuthuoro]] || [[word:vazhunujuoro|vazhunujuoro]] || [[word:vazhunushuoro|vazhunushuoro]] || [[word:vazhunukuoro|vazhunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
